caption: A man is seated in a recording studio against a dark, sound-dampening wall with vertical ridges. He wears a grey t-shirt, a grey and white trucker hat with a shark mouth logo, and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone is positioned directly in front of his face, held by a black boom arm that features the text "BentoAudio Studio Boom". The man has a visible tattoo on his upper right arm. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a fixed position, speaking into the microphone. His facial expressions and head posture shift subtly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing, but there are no significant changes in his posture or the arrangement of the equipment. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man and the recording gear.
